query:
SELECT ai.id, ai.item_id, ai.item_type, ai.quantity, ic.category AS catalog_cat, ec.equip_id
FROM agent_inventory ai
LEFT JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON ai.item_id = ic.item_id
LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON ai.item_id = ec.equip_id
WHERE ai.id > 554
ORDER BY ai.id;
command:

LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON ai.item_id = ec.equip_id
